chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-5260 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of Main Case 30-01-2025 Mr. Ashiq Muhammad Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Muhammad Amir, SP Technical, Special Branch, Karachi Mr. Imran Ahmed Khan Abro, Assistant Advocate General Sindh This petition seeks orders of this Court for the Petitioner to be appointed in the Police Department on son quota. The comments available on file dated 01.12.2023 states that the appointment could not take place due to the dispute between the heirs of the deceased. Prima facie that suggests that it is a factual dispute requiring inquiry/investigation/evidence etc., not amenable for adjudication in writ jurisdiction. Be that as it may, The Supreme Court has already declared the same to be unlawful vide judgment dated 26.09.2024 in the case of General Post Office Islamabad vs. Muhammad Jalal (Civil Petition No.3390 of 2021). It has also been reported that Rule 11-A of the Sindh Civil Servants (Appointment, Promotion & Transfer) Rules, 1974, has already been deleted by the Sindh Cabinet on 04.12.2024. In view of the foregoing this petition is prima facie misconceived, hence, the same is dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad PS
